parsed.production_notes: The video consists of live-action, human-recorded footage of hands handling cash and a smartphone, combined with screen recordings and graphic overlays. There are no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: A person with a light to medium complexion. Only their hands and forearms are visible. They have well-manicured nails.
characters.wardrobe: A thick, ribbed, long-sleeved sweater in a vibrant blue color.
characters.demeanor: Focused and methodical, as they handle a large amount of cash.

characters.appearance: A person with a medium to dark complexion. Only their hands are visible holding a smartphone.
characters.wardrobe: Not visible, as only hands are shown.
characters.demeanor: Interactive, as they are shown navigating a smartphone interface.

scenes.setting: An overhead view of a wooden desk. A clear acrylic cash organizer is visible, with compartments holding stacks of Indian Rupee notes (₹500, ₹200, ₹100) and coins. A reddish-brown leather wallet or clutch is also on the desk.

panels.panel_visual_description: An overhead, top-down shot of a wooden desk. A pair of hands belonging to Character A, who is wearing a blue ribbed sweater, are seen counting a thick stack of Indian 500 Rupee notes. The hands place the counted money onto a reddish-brown leather clutch. In the background, a clear acrylic cash organizer contains neatly arranged stacks of 500, 200, and 100 Rupee notes, along with some coins. The lighting is bright and even.

scenes.visual_description: An overhead shot shows Character A's hands counting a large stack of 500 Rupee notes over a wooden desk. A bank SMS notification from 'Bank of India' pops up at the top, showing a credit of ₹2,01,108. Below this, a text overlay in Hindi reads 'अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍😍'.
scenes.on_screen_text:
truecaller SMS • 20:00
BOI Bank of India
+ ₹ 2,01,108
Credited to Account 0002
MARK AS READ VIEW PROFILE
अपने परिवार का सबसे अमीर आदमी बनने के लिए Download कीजिये Zinglish App 😍😍 (To become the richest person in your family, download the Zinglish App 😍😍)

scenes.setting: Indoors, a person is holding a smartphone. The background is slightly out of focus but appears to be an indoor space.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character B's hands holding a black smartphone in a rugged black case. The phone screen displays a messaging app with a dark theme. A purple message bubble is visible. Character B's thumb taps on the message, causing a new pop-up to appear on the screen. The lighting is soft, with a slight warm, pinkish glow cast over the scene.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up on a smartphone held by Character B. The screen shows an RCS message from an 'Unknown' sender with a UPI Mandate for Rs. 2000.00 from HDFC Bank. The user's finger taps on the message, and a pop-up appears with the same message translated into Hindi, along with a 'Chat with Zia' button.

scenes.setting: Indoors, a person is holding a smartphone. The background is out of focus.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character B's hands holding a black smartphone in a rugged case. The phone screen displays an app store page with a light theme. The user's finger comes into frame and taps on a prominent blue button on the screen. The lighting is bright and neutral.

scenes.visual_description: The same smartphone from the previous scene, held by Character B, now shows the Google Play Store page for 'Zinglish: English Speaking App'. The user's finger taps the 'Open' button.
